name: Magic Initiate

prerequisites.repeatableNote: Must choose a different spell list each time.

description: Choose a spell list (Cleric, Druid, or Wizard). You learn two cantrips from that list. Choose one level 1 spell from the same list — it is always prepared. You can cast it once without a spell slot, regaining that ability on a Long Rest. You can also cast it using spell slots. When you gain a level, you can replace one chosen spell with another of the same level from the same list.
